merged_prs.title: ZDC Reconstruction Bug Fixes
Enable DNN supercluster in Phase2 HLT
[UBSAN][Math] Suppress signed-integer-overflow for approx_exp
Generalize warp size in pixel clustering kernel
Porting the Pixel Barycentre tool in the All-in-One framework
Update the run3_data GT in autoCond to the version intended for the 2022, 2023, 2024CDE rereco
Run3-alca249 Modify calibration macros to use the current IsoTrack calibration
[Core] Mark cms::Exception and edm::Exception functions that throw exceptions as noreturn
Move "hybrid" tau production from nano to mini step
Add dedxLikelihood to 2023 UPC rereco
Fix beamspot in PATElectronProducer
New Tests PR Tests for HIN 2023 and 2024
make `{DIGI,RECO}HI2024MIX` steps consume the HIon HLT menu
Phase-2 mkFit: propagation to plane / Kalman operations on plane / Matriplex with support for scalar operations and VDT
Fix `SiStripG2GainsValidator`
MTD Validation: Add printouts and protection for optional plots in BtlLocalRecoValidation
Run3-377C Add the testing code for the ZDC Topology class
